message:
fix(pipeline): fix parallel loop execution bugs

- Fix index calculation bug where parallel iterations got wrong indices
  (e.g., 0, 2, 4 instead of 0, 1, 2) due to mutation during map callback
- Fix race condition where parallel iterations overwrote each other's
  loop variables by using isolated keys per iteration
- Add security warnings for new Function() usage in transform operations
- Update result collection to use return values from executeIteration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
